overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game depicting a character in a cowboy hat walking through a muddy street in a historic frontier town during a stormy night. Gas lamps illuminate the wooden veranda buildings as lightning periodically flashes across the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy frontier town street with wooden veranda buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy street past wooden buildings with covered verandas

entered.detail: weathered wooden building with covered porch and white trim windows
cast iron lamp post with warm orange glow illuminating the muddy street
wet muddy street surface reflecting the gas lamp light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy street in a frontier town at night, passing a two-story wooden building with a covered veranda. Gas lamps cast a warm glow on the wet ground, and the street is empty of other people or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier town street with wooden storefronts and distant hotel

events.description: passing the first large veranda building, revealing more storefronts and a distant illuminated hotel ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the muddy street as the first building recedes and more of the town becomes visible ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden picket fence running alongside the street
large three-story building with multiple illuminated windows visible in the distance
row of wooden commercial buildings with lit windows lining the right side

segments.scene_description: Moving past the initial building, the street opens to reveal more wooden storefronts on the right and a large illuminated hotel building visible in the distance. A wooden fence appears on the left as the character continues through the muddy street.

scene_state.functional_zone: main town square with grand hotel building ahead

events.description: lightning flashes across the stormy sky illuminating the town buildings
second lightning strike visible in the sky behind the hotel building

agents.ego_description: walking toward the illuminated grand hotel at the center of town during the thunderstorm

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the main town square where the large multi-story hotel dominates the view ahead. Lightning periodically illuminates the stormy sky as the street widens into an open muddy plaza surrounded by wooden buildings on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked frontier town that gradually opens from a narrow street into a wide, storm-swept plaza. It begins by trailing a character walking past a two-story wooden building, where gas lamps cast a warm, localized glow onto the muddy ground. As the camera moves forward, the view expands to reveal a row of wooden storefronts on the right and a rustic fence on the left, while a large illuminated hotel emerges in the far distance. The scene then shifts toward the heart of the town, where the street widens into an open muddy square dominated by the multi-story hotel. Finally, the perspective settles into the plaza as periodic flashes of lightning illuminate the dark, stormy sky above the surrounding wooden architecture.
